title: fix(runs): add GET /runs list endpoint to resolve Recent runs HTTP 404
description: Frontend fetchRuns() calls GET /runs but backend runs router has no GET / (only /:id). Add RunService.list(ownerId) -> runStore.list(ownerId) and router.get('/') owner-scoped via req.user.userId. TDD: service list tests + route 200/owner-scope tests.

title: fix(nav): remove redundant /runs sub-nav; promote 'Your usage' to masthead
description: Delete the runs-nav row in app/runs/page.tsx (duplicates masthead). Add { label: 'Your usage', href: '/observability' } to NAV_ITEMS. Update site-nav.test.tsx to assert it. Keep .runs-nav CSS (still used by gallery/[id]/demo).

title: /runs page polish: nav cleanup, list-404, dropdown restyle
description: Fixes from General review of /runs: (1) remove redundant sub-nav row + promote 'Your usage' to masthead, (2) resolve Recent runs HTTP 404 via missing GET /runs list endpoint, (3) restyle start-run dropdowns to Atelier theme.

title: [TDD] 'Draft a Post' CTA on persona -> /runs?persona=<id> preselected
description: Add a 'Draft a Post' button on the persona card (and persona detail) linking to /runs?persona=<id>. /runs reads ?persona via useSearchParams (Suspense boundary) and passes initialPersonaId to StartRunForm; StartRunForm accepts initialPersonaId and preselects it. Files: personas/page.tsx, personas/[id]/persona-detail.tsx, runs/page.tsx, components/StartRunForm.tsx.

title: Persona: gallery polish + Draft-a-Post CTA
description: Clean up the busy /personas gallery card and add a 'Draft a Post' button on a persona that opens /runs with that persona preselected.

title: [TDD] Clean up persona gallery card (Atelier: tame the all-vermillion voice, compact design tags, tighter hierarchy)
description: frontend/app/personas/page.tsx + personas.css. Voice text currently full --accent (violates one-accent rule); design entries render as full-width stacked pills (clunky). Make voice --ink/--muted, design entries compact inline tags, tighten card.

title: [BUG] test env: window.localStorage.clear is not a function (59 pre-existing jsdom failures)
description: Repo-wide test setup bug, predates nav epic, confirmed on origin/main. Likely a jsdom localStorage shim missing in frontend tests/setup. Blocks a green full suite.
close_reason: Fixed via in-memory localStorage shim in frontend/tests/setup.ts (commit 5a1fe3b). Frontend suite 59-failing → 0; now 44 files / 268 tests green on Node 25.

title: [BUG] active-path over-matches: /runs/* double-lights /runs (two aria-current); fix isActivePath + add active-state test
description: UX+QA: NavLink isActivePath treats every /runs/* as nested under /runs, so /runs/gallery & /runs/demo render two aria-current=page + double accent. Fix nested-match logic; add the missing data-active/active-state test. frontend/components/nav/NavLink.tsx.

title: Review remediation (QA/code/UX findings)
description: Fixes from the squad review of the nav build.

title: [TDD] MobileMenu disclosure + a11y/motion
description: T007. frontend/components/nav/MobileMenu.tsx + responsive/reduced-motion in site-nav.css; tests mobile-menu.test.tsx (RED->GREEN).

title: [TDD] AppShell + mount in RootLayout
description: T006. frontend/components/nav/AppShell.tsx (SkipLink+SiteNav+#main wrapper) mounted in frontend/app/layout.tsx; tests app-shell.test.tsx (RED->GREEN).

title: [TDD] SiteNav masthead + auth cluster
description: T004. frontend/components/nav/SiteNav.tsx — NAV_ITEMS+NavLink+useAuth, reuse Button/LogoutButton; tests site-nav.test.tsx (RED->GREEN).

title: [scaffold] tokenized masthead css
description: T005. frontend/components/nav/site-nav.css — Atelier tokens only, no hard-coded values.

title: [TDD] SkipLink (skip-to-content)
description: T003. frontend/components/nav/SkipLink.tsx -> #main; tests in skip-link.test.tsx (RED->GREEN).

title: [scaffold] nav-items IA config
description: T001. frontend/components/nav/nav-items.ts — NAV_ITEMS + NavItem type (label, href, requiresAuth?, adminOnly?).

title: [TDD] NavLink active-state
description: T002. frontend/components/nav/NavLink.tsx — active via usePathname + aria-current; tests in nav-link.test.tsx (RED->GREEN).

title: US2 — responsive + accessibility (MobileMenu)
description: Phase 3. Disclosure menu, keyboard/Escape, focus, reduced-motion. Task T007.

title: US1 — global nav mounted (SiteNav, css, AppShell) [MVP]
description: Phase 2. SiteNav masthead + auth cluster, tokenized css, AppShell mounted in RootLayout. Tasks T004-T006.

title: Foundational — nav primitives (nav-items, NavLink, SkipLink)
description: Phase 1. Build IA config + active-state link + skip-to-content. Tasks T001-T003.

title: Site Navigation (Global App Shell)
description: Mount one Atelier-styled global navigation in RootLayout connecting the ~10 isolated pages; auth-aware, role-gated, responsive, accessible. Spec: specs/006-site-navigation/.

title: style(runs): restyle start-run dropdowns to Atelier theme
description: Native <select> chrome looks off-theme. appearance:none + token-based custom chevron, consistent border/radius/padding/hover with Atelier inputs. CSS-only in runs-ui.css (pure styling, no unit test per testing rules).

title: Mobile wayfinding: surface Log in + Author-CTA in disclosure; add focus-trap/return + click-outside-close
description: UX: mobile drops Log in + Author your persona and the disclosure panel lacks them; menu lacks focus management + click-outside.

title: Atelier token cleanup in site-nav.css (focus rings -> global :focus-visible, tokenize blur/2px, remove dead .site-nav-user)
description: code review: 6 hard-coded outline:2px focus rings diverge from global 3px :focus-visible; hard-coded blur(8px)/2px violate atelier.md; dead .site-nav-user class.

title: Resolve dead flags: render-or-remove secondary/data-secondary (Demo de-emphasis) + dead requiresAuth contract
description: all reviewers: secondary flag styled but never emitted; requiresAuth declared+documented but never consumed.

title: [docs] document nav IA
description: T010. Add Navigation section to specs/design/atelier.md + frontend/components/nav/README.md.

title: [TDD] reconcile page headers (Atelier-clean)
description: T009. Remove duplicated nav + fix inline-style headers in personas/page.tsx + personas/[id]/persona-detail.tsx; update page tests (RED->GREEN).

title: [TDD] admin role gating
description: T008. adminOnly filtering in SiteNav via useAuth().user?.role; tests extend site-nav.test.tsx (RED->GREEN).

title: Polish — page-header cleanup + docs
description: Phase 5. Remove duplicated nav, fix inline-style violations, document nav. Tasks T009-T010.

title: US3 — admin role gating
description: Phase 4. adminOnly nav items hidden from non-admins. Task T008.
